heading: Saturday
text: Sunshine, mixing with clouds east of the Greens, becoming mostly cloudy west. Highs in the 60s in the sun, low 70s west, in the 50s under cloudy skies east. Southeast wind increasing to 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 mph east, up to 35 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Mostly cloudy, with rain spreading east. Scattered showers moving across northern NY after dark, crossing the Green around midnight. Lows in the 40s. South wind at 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 mph northeast, up to 35 mph west of the Greens, decreasing overnight.

heading: Sunday
text: Rain, becoming heavy before noon, and mixing with snow over the mountains, then diminishing west to east in the afternoon and early evening. Cooler, Highs in the 40s to low 50s in the morning, falling through the afternoon. Light wind becoming northwest 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 15 mph late in the day.
